children.data: - Your bank may charge a one-time account registration fee.

child.data: What is Auto Payment or mandate registration?

children.data: Auto Payment or mandate registration is a digital method you can use to automate payments for your instalments, SIPs, bill payments, etc. Through Auto Payment, your bank receives a standing instruction to debit the instalment amount automatically on the due date.

child.data: What is Auto Payment or mandate registration?
What is Auto Payment or mandate registration?

children.data: Auto Payment or mandate registration is a digital method you can use to automate payments for your instalments, SIPs, bill payments, etc. Through Auto Payment, your bank receives a standing instruction to debit the instalment amount automatically on the due date.

child.data: What is Auto Payment or mandate registration?
How to set up Auto Payment or register e-mandate?

children.data: You can register Auto Payment via net banking, the BFL app, or by submitting a physical mandate form at your nearest branch. The mandate is verified with your bank before it becomes active.

child.data: How to set up Auto Payment or register e-mandate?
What are the benefits of setting up Auto Payment?

children.data: Auto Payment ensures your instalments are never missed, helps you avoid late payment charges, and removes the need to manually pay every month.

child.data: What are the benefits of setting up Auto Payment?

child.data: What are the benefits of setting up Auto Payment?
What are the different methods of setting up Auto Payment?

children.data: You can set up Auto Payment through UPI AutoPay, NACH e-mandate via net banking, or a physical ECS mandate submitted at a branch.
